title: Numerical Error, Roots, Interpolation, and Quadrature · Worked Case: Numerical Differentiation
summary: Build, test, and communicate a model involving precision-sensitive scientific computation. Planned artifact: Add and verify the math adv numerical differentiation increment in a reproducible numerical foundations computational study. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Validate numerical differentiation in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.

Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-advanced cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper

steps.title: Calculate Numerical Differentiation evidence
steps.why: A numerical result is not complete until its unit, assumptions, scale, and tolerance survive a reasonableness check.

content.text: For a 2×2 matrix, determinant = ad − bc. Use (5 × 8) − (1 × 2).
